channel.title: Kde on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Kde on Arrans github.io

item.title: wwmm/easyeffects
item.description: Limiter, compressor, convolver, equalizer and auto volume and many other plugins for PipeWire applications

item.title: arran4/kjules
item.description: A C++ application built with KDE Frameworks that provides a desktop interface for interacting with the Google Jules API

item.title: shvedes/awesome-kde
item.description: A curated list of awesome KDE applications, plugins, and resources

item.title: arran4/kgithub-notify
item.description: A sleek GitHub notification system tray application written natively in C++ using Qt6 and KDE Frameworks 6 (KF6). It quietly monitors your GitHub account, notifying you when there are new notifications, and provides a rich desktop interface to manage themGithub notifier for KDE

item.title: arran4/KMagMux
item.description: Torrent and Magent file and protocol handler for routing to programs / services

item.title: ChocolateLoverRaj/rust-fp
item.description: Fingerprint library, dbus interface, CLI, and PAM module for unlocking Linux with fingerprint sensors. Currently for Chromebooks.

item.title: comxd/plasma-kdeconnect-sms
item.description: 📱 💬 Plasmoid for KDE Connect allowing SMS sending from your desktop — KDE Plasma 6

item.title: arran4/kde-keyboard-shortcuts
item.description: A quick and simple installer for my kde keyboard bindings in system, as a deb/rpm file

item.title: JunoNgx/kde-currently-playing
item.description: A minimal media info widget for KDE Plasma
